UserProgress.title: User Progress
UserProgress.description: User's progress across words, including stars, status, and SRS data

starred.description: Map of word IDs (questions) to boolean

progress.description: Map of word IDs to WordStatus (new, mastered, review)

srs.description: Map of word IDs to SRS data objects (interval, ease, next)

dailyLog.description: Map of date strings to array of word IDs

recent.description: Array of recently viewed word IDs

/users/{userId}.description: Information about a user's language learning progress
